content.title: Mill
content.text: We've got our pick of millstones. With a mill, we'd have better bread and more time for other crafts.
A convenient, consistent power source (wind on a hill, a waterwheel, a Herd of Horses, magic, etc.)
A building site able to harness that power source
Pulling Together 2 times, each requiring a season, 1 Surplus, a wagonload of timber (Value 2), and a bunch of rope and supplies (Value 2)

When you meet the requirements, increase Fortunes by 1, add "Mill" to the Resources list and draw it on the map.

Henceforth, when the autumn harvest is complete, the steading generates +1 Surplus. Also, when you Outfit from Stonetop or Have What You Need after doing so, each of supplies has 1 extra use.
